evaluations.pull_rule: Demo source: pull evaluation rows that reference markdown files with YYYY/MM/DD text.

probable_requirements.pull_rule: Demo source: pull Probable requirement rows and preserve validation status across refreshes.

release_updates.pull_rule: Demo source: pull release update rows and normalize release, title, status, note, and source.

testing_results.pull_rule: Demo source: pull release testing rows and normalize feature, result, tested prompt, and demo-use notes.

capabilities.pull_rule: Demo source: pull topic, current capability, match phrases, SC guidance, and last updated. Grade fields are excluded.

changes.text: Generated design preview data from synthetic sample records.
One Probable requirement was marked Product Validated and queued for workbook update.

evaluations.title: Sample Services Co. - NetSuite Next Evaluation
evaluations.recommendation: Proceed after SC review if the initial scope stays focused on core financials and standard integrations.

evaluations.title: Example Manufacturing Group - NetSuite Next Evaluation
evaluations.recommendation: Hold until product validates advanced manufacturing and integration requirements.

probable.reason: Marked Probable because the workflow keeps payroll processing outside NetSuite and only requires summarized journal or import data.
Marked Probable because integrations may be supportable, but the exact records, fields, ownership, and data placement need product confirmation.
Marked Probable because the requirement could map to a supported connector pattern, but depends on the exact banking method and file/API path.

releases.title: Navigation and Test Drive Improvements
releases.note: Sample release note showing a navigation update that may improve demo readiness.

releases.title: Financials Workflow Polish
releases.note: Sample release note for a work-in-progress capability that should stay out of standard demos until testing is complete.

testing.prompt: Validate standard bank-feed setup and reconciliation demo flow.
testing.demoUse: Ready for standard financials demo path.

testing.prompt: Validate whether the integration pattern is supported for the requested customer workflow.
testing.demoUse: Use only as a scoped discovery conversation until product confirms.

capabilities.scGuidance: Supported for standard financials-first evaluation paths.
Use standard bank-feed positioning unless the customer requires a non-standard connector.
Route through product validation when customer success depends on a specific integration method.
